data.body: Resumed epic jira-reb-687 (LLM failure handling) in worktree reb-687. HEAD 278fedf32 (debug fix committed); origin/main advanced to 965fd9eee (rebase deferred to endgame). Epic + story-0 arawana in_progress/claimed; children 1-6 open; matrix test not yet written; tree clean. Empirically pinned CURRENT runner behavior via discover scripts: HTTP/timeout/refusal/incomplete->LLMUnavailableError; canned content_filter+length finish_reason->UnretryableOutputError; unparseable->StructuredOutputError; model-raised UsageLimitExceeded->LLMRunnerError; UsageLimits(request_limit=max(1,ceil(mi/2)),tool_calls_limit=max(8,mi)); plan-review gate on injected 429->INDETERMINATE unsigned; review_code disabled->inert runner never called; pass1 systemic re-raised, non-systemic per-chunk dropped. Now authoring tests/unit/test_llm_failure_matrix.py.
